# pangolin_resource_whitelist (Resource)

Adds an email address to the whitelist of a Pangolin HTTP resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pangolin_resource_whitelist" "example" {
  resource_id = pangolin_resource.example.id
  email       = "alice@example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email` (String) The email address to whitelist.
- `resource_id` (Number) The ID of the HTTP resource.
